name: The Ultimate Chocolate Chip Cookie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cup Firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine Butter Flavor Crisco, brown sugar, milk, and vanilla. Mix until creamy.
3. Beat in the egg.
4. Gradually add flour, salt, and baking soda, mixing until just combined.
5. Stir in chocolate chips and pecan pieces (if using).
6. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased baking sheet, spacing about 2 inches apart.
7. Bake for 8-10 minutes for chewy cookies (cookies will appear moist; do not overbake) or 11-13 minutes for crisp cookies.
8. Let cool on the baking sheet for 2 minutes before transferring to a wire rack on the countertop.
